description_long: This is a thick, hardbound book with a textured brown cover that resembles rough, layered wood or bark. The cover is adorned with large, irregular golden markings or symbols that appear hand-painted or inscribed, giving it a mystical or ancient appearance. The book's pages are visible along the sides, showing a slightly yellowed, aged paper. The edges of the cover are uneven and rugged, further enhancing its rustic, magical look. There are no visible illustrations or images on the cover apart from the golden markings. The spine is plain and blends seamlessly with the rest of the cover, lacking any visible text or decorative elements.
description: A thick, hardbound book with a textured brown cover and large golden markings, resembling an ancient or magical tome.
description_view_0: The book is seen from the side, showing the textured brown cover with prominent golden markings and the visible edge of the pages.
description_view_1: The book is viewed from the top, highlighting the full extent of the golden markings across the cover and the rugged, bark-like texture.
description_view_2: The opposite side view reveals the continuation of the textured cover and golden markings, with the page edges visible on the left.
description_view_3: The book is seen from the bottom, displaying the underside of the cover with some golden markings extending to the edge and the layered texture.
